pageContext.name: Dejah Thoris
pageContext.description: … just as we neared the throng of Martians, I caught a glimpse of the prisoner … the beauty of her perfect and symmetrical figure.   Sideshow and Premium Collectibles Studio present the Dejah Thoris 1:3 Scale Statue, a sci-fi statue collectible for fans of the Martian novels by Edgar Rice Burroughs.  The beautiful princess of Mars has been taken prisoner in this showstopping statue design, a perfect centerpiece for any sci-fi fan's collection. The Dejah Thoris 1:3 Scale Statue measures 35.5 tall and 15 wide as she stands chained to a large white tusk in the hostile landscape of Mars. Additional bones and skulls are embedded in the rock at her feet, including the uniquely shaped remains of a green Martian. She awaits rescue from the Earthman John Carter, a hero who pledges to protect the princess and her kingdom of Helium.  The Dejah Thoris Statue is fully sculpted apart from the silver link shackles on her wrists and the decorative gold chains on her chest. Dejah Thoris' portrait features a cascade of black hair and metallic makeup accents complementing her customary Martian ensemble. From head to toe, the Martian woman's beautiful bronze physique has been carefully considered, and she is adorned with gold accents including her strapped sandals, thong bikini, arm cuffs, and ornate crown. This highly detailed Dejah Thoris collectible brings the world of Barsoom closer to home.  Brave the wastes of Mars and add the Dejah Thoris 1:3 Scale Statue by Premium Collectibles Studio to your collection today!
